problem.summary: The active connector probe expected /mcp but the Lantern OS server only exposed the legacy /sse + /messages transport on port 8771.
problem.boundary: Repository update is committed, but live local runtime and tunnel health still require local execution evidence.

changes.purpose: Add modern connector compatibility routes while preserving the existing server.py /sse + /messages behavior.
Launch server_modern.py by default and retain -Legacy for the old launcher.
Make the modern /mcp endpoint the primary MCP server and keep the legacy SSE config as fallback.

safety.privateDataBoundary: No private folder, disk, boot, or secret access is granted by discovery routes.
safety.remoteTunnelTrust: Do not promote remote/tunnel status until the local checks pass and the tunnel is pointed at port 8771.
